text: PA request for a shoulder MRI for member NH-611204 with suspected rotator cuff tear after a fall. Attached: orthopedic physician order, eight weeks of documented physical therapy notes, positive impingement signs on exam.

PA request for semaglutide (Wegovy) for member NH-622817 for weight management, BMI 32, no diagnosis of diabetes. Attached: physician order and weight history. The Northfield Health plan excludes weight-loss medications from coverage.

PA request for a brain MRI for member NH-633590 who called the intake line reporting frequent headaches and asking for a scan. No physician order, no neurology consultation, and no clinical documentation are attached.

PA request for infliximab for member NH-644362 with moderate-to-severe Crohn's disease. Attached: gastroenterologist order, documentation of failed conventional therapy (mesalamine and azathioprine over nine months), negative TB screening.

PA request for tirzepatide (Zepbound) for member NH-655138 for weight loss, BMI 34 without diabetes. Attached: prescriber order and gym membership receipts. Weight-loss drugs are listed as an exclusion in the member's plan.
PA request for a standard wheelchair for member NH-666901 reported as having difficulty walking. No physician order, no physical therapy evaluation, and no home assessment are attached.

supplemental: Member's handwritten note describing difficulty walking around the house

text: PA request for cataract surgery (right eye) for member NH-677543 with best corrected visual acuity of 20/70 and disabling glare. Attached: ophthalmologist order, visual acuity and glare testing results, surgical consultation notes.

PA request for a lumbar spine MRI for member NH-688215 with chronic low back pain. Attached: physician order and neurological exam notes documenting left-sided radiculopathy; physical therapy records are not included with the submission.

supplemental: Physical therapy progress notes documenting eight weeks of supervised treatment with inadequate response

text: PA request for liraglutide (Saxenda) for member NH-699087 for weight management, BMI 31, no diabetes diagnosis. Attached: physician order. The plan document excludes medications prescribed for weight loss.

PA request for adalimumab (Humira) for member NH-610859 submitted by a pharmacy technician. The indication field is blank, no diagnosis documentation and no prior therapy records are attached, and the prescriber's office has not responded to two outreach attempts.

PA request for laser tattoo removal on the forearm for member NH-621630 who reports regret about the tattoo. Attached: dermatology consultation notes. The stated goal is appearance improvement; tattoo removal is a cosmetic service excluded from coverage.

PA request for a BiPAP device for member NH-632402 with obstructive sleep apnea intolerant of CPAP. Attached: in-lab polysomnography with AHI of 41, documented failed CPAP titration, sleep specialist order and compliance plan.

PA request for semaglutide (Ozempic) for member NH-643174 without a type 2 diabetes diagnosis; the stated purpose is weight reduction before a wedding. Attached: prescriber order. Off-label weight-loss use is excluded under the plan's weight-loss medication exclusion.

PA request for posterior lumbar fusion for member NH-653946 reporting severe back pain. No imaging reports, no conservative therapy documentation, and no surgical consultation notes are attached to the submission.

PA request for a diagnostic colonoscopy for member NH-664718 with iron-deficiency anemia and a positive FIT result. Attached: gastroenterologist order, CBC and iron studies, primary care referral notes.

PA request for IV vitamin and glutathione infusion therapy for member NH-675481 reporting chronic fatigue and a desire for general wellness optimization. Attached: naturopathic clinic brochure. Wellness infusion therapy is not a covered benefit and lacks evidence of medical necessity.

PA request for an insulin pump for member NH-686253 with type 1 diabetes on multiple daily injections with documented hypoglycemic unawareness. Attached: endocrinologist order, three months of glucose logs, diabetes education completion certificate.

PA request for autologous stem-cell injections for knee osteoarthritis for member NH-697025 seeking to avoid knee replacement. Attached: orthopedic consultation notes. Stem-cell therapy for osteoarthritis is considered experimental and investigational under the plan.
PA request for a home oxygen concentrator for member NH-608797 who reports shortness of breath. No arterial blood gas results, no overnight oximetry study, and no physician order are attached.

supplemental: Photo of the member's home pulse oximeter display taken by a family member

text: PA request for knee arthroscopy for member NH-619569 with persistent medial knee pain and locking episodes after twelve weeks of documented physical therapy and NSAIDs. Attached: orthopedic surgeon order and conservative therapy records; the MRI report referenced in the order is not attached.

supplemental: MRI report confirming a medial meniscal tear with a displaced fragment

text: PA request for whole-body MRI screening for member NH-630341 as part of an executive health program; the member is asymptomatic with no findings on exam. Attached: concierge clinic order. Screening imaging without clinical indication is excluded from coverage.

PA request for a cervical epidural steroid injection for member NH-641113 with cervical radiculopathy. Attached: pain specialist order, cervical MRI showing C6 nerve root compression, six weeks of documented physical therapy with inadequate relief.

PA request for rhinoplasty for member NH-651885 who is unhappy with the shape of the nose. Attached: plastic surgeon consultation notes and photographs. No airway obstruction, trauma history, or functional impairment is documented; the stated goal is aesthetic.

PA request for a comprehensive hereditary cancer gene panel for member NH-662657 requested through an online portal. No genetic counseling note, no personal or family cancer history documentation, and no ordering clinician details are attached.
PA request for panniculectomy for member NH-673429 after significant weight loss. The submission does not include photographs, weight history, or documentation of skin conditions.

supplemental: Plastic surgeon letter stating the goal is to improve abdominal contour and appearance after weight loss; no rashes, ulceration, or functional impairment documented

text: PA request for a hospital bed for home use for member NH-684201 with ALS and documented inability to reposition independently. Attached: physician order, home health assessment, occupational therapy evaluation.
PA request for botulinum toxin injections for member NH-694973 submitted with the indication field left blank. No consultation notes or diagnosis documentation are attached.

supplemental: Clinic clarification letter: the injections are requested for forehead wrinkle reduction (cosmetic)

text: PA request for adalimumab (Humira) for member NH-605746 with moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis. Attached: dermatologist order and negative TB screening; records of prior topical and phototherapy trials are not included in the submission.

supplemental: Dermatology treatment history documenting failed high-potency topicals and twelve sessions of phototherapy with inadequate response

text: PA request for semaglutide (Wegovy) for member NH-616518 for weight loss ahead of a planned orthopedic surgery, BMI 33, no diabetes. Attached: surgeon's letter recommending weight loss. The plan excludes weight-loss medications regardless of indication.

PA request for a sleep study referral form for member NH-627290 uploaded as a blurry photo. The form is largely illegible; no physician order, clinical notes, or completed questionnaire can be read from the submission.
